queries.question: Show all the adventure movies and action movies directed by Sofia Martinez.
queries.sql:
SELECT Movies.Title 
FROM Movies JOIN Directors ON Movies.DirectorId = Directors.DirectorId
WHERE (Movies.FilmStyle = "Adventure Movie" OR Movies.FilmStyle = "Action Movie") AND Directors.Name = "Sofia Martinez"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movie .
  ?directors a :Director .
  ?movies p:hasDirectors ?directors .
  ?movies p:Title ?title .
  ?movies p:FilmStyle ?filmstyle_w .
  ?movies p:FilmStyle ?filmstyle_w2 .
  ?directors p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?filmstyle_w) = "Adventure Movie" || STR(?filmstyle_w2) = "Action Movie")) && STR(?name_w) = "Sofia Martinez"))
}

  ?movies p:Title ?title .
